title: mldsa_round_trip test uses self-oracle (sign and verify with same HSM)
description: The mldsa_round_trip integration test (tests/integration.rs, cfg(feature=mldsa)) signs with wolfHSM and verifies with wolfHSM. This is a self-oracle: it proves the sign/verify functions are mutually consistent, not that they conform to the ML-DSA (FIPS 204) specification. A systematic implementation error (e.g. wrong message encoding, wrong level parameter mapping) would not be caught. An independent oracle (e.g. ml-dsa crate or NIST ACVP test vectors) is required per the project test design constraint.
